title: Diligence Preparation Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger diligence preparation foundations judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Diligence Preparation Foundations is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Diligence Preparation Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good diligence preparation foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Diligence Preparation Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
